isolation.boundary: Local app surface only; assigned assertions only; no source-code edits

assertions.title: DateNavigation with picker, arrows, presets, and view toggle

steps.observed: At trend date=2026-04-05, Next day button was disabled (is enabled => false).

steps.action: Open date picker and select Apr 3, 2026
steps.expected: Calendar opens and selected date updates navigation context
steps.observed: Date picker opened; selecting Apr 3 navigated to /dashboard?view=night&date=2026-04-03.

steps.expected: View toggle preserves same date context

steps.observed: 7D set range=7 and 1Y set range=365 in URL while keeping date context.

steps.action: Use arrows and earliest backward boundary check
steps.expected: Arrows navigate date and previous disables at earliest bound
steps.observed: Next arrow advanced to 2026-04-04; at old boundary date=2020-01-01 Previous day button was disabled (is enabled => false).

evidence.network: UI route transitions verified via URL changes (night/recovery/trend with preserved date; range=7 and range=365 presets).

assertions.title: Correlation card with coefficients and share action

steps.expected: Correlation card visible with Pearson coefficients and directional labels
steps.observed: Trend strips rendered, but no correlation card/coefficients visible in viewport or full-page capture.

steps.action: Inspect DOM text/buttons for correlation + share action
steps.observed: Eval result: hasCorrelation=false; shareButtonsCount=1 with only sidebar "Shared Links" anchor (no correlation-card share button).

assertions.issues: CorrelationCard contract not met: no Pearson correlation values/strength labels rendered and no in-card Share action present.

assertions.title: Responsive layout at desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

steps.expected: Single-column mobile layout with no horizontal overflow
steps.observed: At 375x812: viewportWidth=375 and docScrollWidth=375 (docClientWidth=375, bodyScrollWidth=375), indicating no horizontal overflow.

assertions.title: View navigation preserves context on browser back

steps.observed: Trend set to date=2026-04-04 with 7D + Daily; selected tabs = [Trend, 7D, Daily]; metric context = [Resting Heart Rate, Heart Rate Variability, Sleep Score].

steps.action: Navigate Trend -> Night by clicking trend date label
steps.expected: Date click opens Night for clicked date
steps.observed: Clicking chart date label (tspan Apr 4) navigated to /dashboard?view=night&date=2026-04-04.

steps.expected: Return to Trend with same range/smoothing/metrics context
steps.observed: Returned to /dashboard?view=trend&date=2026-04-04&range=7&smoothing=daily with selected tabs still [Trend, 7D, Daily] and same metric strip set.

steps.action: Check no full reload / no new API call on back
steps.expected: Client-side back navigation with no new /api/views call
steps.observed: In-page probe variables persisted across navigation; after performance.clearResourceTimings() on Night, back-navigation produced apiEntries=[] for /api/views.

evidence.network: After clearing resource timings on Night before back: performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(name includes '/api/views') => [].

frictions.description: Trend data-point click path is not directly exposed as an interactive ref in snapshot -i output.
frictions.resolution: Used a concrete chart date label click target (SVG tspan for Apr 4) to trigger Trend -> Night navigation deterministically.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-UICMP-003, VAL-UICMP-006, VAL-CROSS-009) and 1 failed (VAL-UITRD-002).
